Game 2:
Winner: Black
Length: 45
Moves: 02-32-35 72-42-45 05-04-74 50-61-50 04-64-24 57-37-36 20-11-15 75-55-65 27-16-27 42-31-42 32-22-21 31-33-53 11-12-23 33-30-63 22-31-20 30-41-40 64-75-57 55-11-66 75-64-46 37-26-25 31-32-43 61-71-73 32-31-04 11-22-32 64-44-33 22-11-22 12-02-12 71-61-70 44-54-34 26-17-26 16-05-16 11-01-11 05-06-07 41-30-41 02-13-02 01-10-01 06-05-06 10-00-10 13-03-13 61-62-71 05-14-05 62-61-62 54-56-67 61-72-61 56-54-44
